bottom_5_citable.label: Poor Citability

bottom_5_citable.heading: Saved me hours
bottom_5_citable.label: Poor Citability
bottom_5_citable.preview: I used the ATS check before every application this month. It helped me tune each resume version quickly without rewriting everything from scratch.
